prompt.text: Ask the customer for their loan ID or customer ID before searching.
Review the loan application status and timeline. Click the advance button to see the full record.
Note the reason for the delay. Then select the correct next action below.
Review the processing policy. Select the appropriate resolution for this delay.
Confirm the action you will take. Add a case note, then click 'Confirm & Apply'.
Return to the customer tab and deliver the update below.

screenConfigs.title: Loan Application Search
screenConfigs.placeholder: Enter loan ID or customer ID...

screenConfigs.title: Delay Reason
screenConfigs.statusText: Income verification documents have been received and logged. Application is now in final underwriting review — decision expected {{decision_time}}.

screenConfigs.title: Resolution Options
screenConfigs.policy:
LOAN PROCESSING POLICY – Personal Loans

Standard Processing Timeline
  • Application to decision:     5–7 business days (standard)
  • Document verification:       2–3 business days
  • Disbursement after approval: 1–2 business days

Final Underwriting Review — Agent Actions
  ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
  │  Documents received:   Confirm decision ETA           │
  │  Add priority note:    Always — for delayed accounts  │
  │  Escalate:             Only if decision date unknown  │
  │  Deny application:     Underwriting decision only     │
  └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Customer Communication Standard
  • Delays > 3 business days: proactive outreach required
  • Provide updated ETA and reason at every contact
  • Document all customer contacts in case notes
screenConfigs.correctMessage: Correct. Decision ETA confirmed. Priority monitoring note added to case.

screenConfigs.title: Apply Actions
screenConfigs.notePlaceholder: e.g. Customer called re: loan delay. Documents received and logged. Application in final underwriting review. Decision expected {{decision_time}}. Priority note added. Customer informed.

screenConfigs.title: Case Updated

items: Confirm income verification documents have been received and logged
State the application is now in final underwriting review
Confirm a priority monitoring note has been added to the case
Explain they will be notified as soon as the decision is finalized

screenConfigs.resolution: Priority note added. Customer informed of final underwriting decision expected {{decision_time}}.
